fields.product_or_service: CRM automation and client follow-up system
fields.video_goal: Generate a premium awareness ad that makes Saudi SMEs feel the pain of missed client follow-up and positions the service as the smooth modern solution.
fields.target_audience: Saudi SME founders, directors, operations managers
fields.creative_direction: Premium cinematic business ad. Saudi context. Warm confidence. Story-driven. No cheap corporate stock-video vibe.
fields.brand_notes: Brand feels premium, efficient, modern, and trustworthy. Avoid hype. Prefer polished lighting and grounded executive realism.
fields.music_style: cinematic premium with subtle Saudi texture

fields.start_image_prompt: Saudi business owner at desk at night, premium office, unanswered client messages on laptop dashboard, cinematic warm practical lighting, realistic Najdi styling, shallow depth of field, vertical frame
fields.end_image_prompt: same Saudi founder leans forward with concern as screen reflects unresolved sales tasks, premium lensing, cinematic realism, vertical frame
fields.transition_prompt: slow push-in with emotional tension, subtle monitor light flicker, begin in stillness and end with urgency
fields.video_prompt: Transform the start frame into the end frame with controlled cinematic motion, subtle eye movement, hand gesture near keyboard, realistic office ambience, premium Saudi business ad style, vertical 9:16
fields.voiceover_segment: كل عميل يتأخر عليه الرد... هو فرصة ممكن ما ترجع.
fields.sfx_prompt: subtle office room tone, mouse click, soft notification tone
fields.music_cue: low emotional tension, premium modern pulse
fields.visual_notes: No cheesy UI overlays. Keep it believable and expensive.

fields.final_caption: نظامك لازم يشتغل بسرعة قرارك. الإعلان التجريبي لنظام CRM مخصص للسوق السعودي.
